strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience with GISCollective; comfortable with entrepreneurial builds
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership or shipped AI products at scale
Title trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level strategic influence
Limited cloud-platform depth (no major hyperscaler architecture or advisory experience)

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and shipped AI products
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and recent touchpoints on AI-agent tooling, but the role demands Director-level IC gravitas, recognized AI expertise, and strategic advisory capability for cloud/AI customers. The resume shows neither shipped AI products at scale nor evidence of influencing org-wide technical strategy, making this a stretch for a Principal/AI Strategy seat.
